series_metadata.series_title: Annual Comprehensive Financial Report (ACFR) and Schedule of Expenditures of Federal Awards (SEFA)
series_metadata.series_description: Includes schedules, working papers, documents, and other information gathered from agencies and other organizations related to the compilations of the ACFR and SEFA.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one copy of the official ACFR permanently. Retain all other records for five years post publication of the audited reports, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain one copy of the official ACFR permanently. Retain all other records for five years post publication of the audited reports, then destroy., Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
